name: Davidson Fellows Scholarship

eligibility.other_requirements: Must be 18 or younger; must submit a significant piece of work in science, technology, mathematics, literature, music, philosophy, or 'outside the box' category; work must have potential for benefit to society

stackable_notes: One-time award; generally stackable with institutional aid. Colleges may count as outside scholarship income — verify displacement risk at need-based schools.
notes: Requires submission of a genuinely significant, original project — not a school science fair project, but work that stands on its own merits (e.g., novel mathematical proof, published research, composed symphony). Only ~20 fellows per year. Carries enormous prestige and recognition in Washington D.C. as part of the award. Best for exceptionally gifted students under 18 who have produced college-level or professional-grade work.
